allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else type\(d\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\): if 'data' in d: print\('data count:', len\(d['data']\)\) print\('first item keys:', list\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\) if d['data'] else 'empty'\) print\('next_cursor:', d.get\('next_cursor',''\)\) for m in d['data'][:2]: print\(' ', m.get\('question',''\)[:60]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {len\(data\)}'\) for e in data[:10]: print\(e['id'], e.get\('endDate','?'\)[:10], e.get\('title',''\)[:80]\) ")
